description: Test your knowledge of ESTA standards, ACN protocols, and documentation requirements

questions.text: What does ACN stand for in ESTA standards?
questions.explanation: ACN stands for Architecture for Control Networks, defined in ANSI E1.17.

questions.text: Which ESTA standard covers ACN operation over TCP?
questions.explanation: ANSI E1.30-11 covers ACN Root Layer Protocol operation on TCP transport.

questions.text: In the hierarchy of controls, which is the most effective?
questions.explanation: Elimination or substitution of the hazard is the most effective control in the hierarchy.

questions.text: Which of the following are Engineering Controls? (Select all)
questions.explanation: Interlocks and enclosures are engineering controls. Eyewear is PPE, and training is administrative.

questions.text: ESTA standards are developed through an ANSI-accredited consensus process.
questions.explanation: ESTA develops standards through the ANSI-accredited Technical Standards Program using consensus procedures.

questions.text: What is the purpose of DDL in ACN?
questions.explanation: DDL (Device Description Language) in ACN allows devices to describe their capabilities for automatic configuration.

questions.text: Which documents are typically required for laser installation hand-over? (Select all)
questions.explanation: Hand-over documentation includes equipment specs, operating procedures, and safety system descriptions - not marketing materials.

questions.text: Which hierarchy level do safety procedures and training belong to?
questions.explanation: Procedures and training are Administrative Controls, which change how people work rather than isolating the hazard.
E1.31 (sACN) provides a lightweight, streaming protocol for ACN over UDP, simpler than full ACN.

questions.text: In the control hierarchy, PPE is preferred over engineering controls when both are options.
questions.explanation: Engineering controls are always preferred over PPE. PPE is the last resort in the hierarchy.

questions.text: Which information should be included in a Risk Assessment? (Select all)
questions.explanation: Risk assessments include hazard identification, control measures, and risk evaluation - not financial projections.

questions.text: What transport protocols can ACN use?
questions.explanation: ACN can operate over UDP (original E1.17) or TCP (E1.30-11) depending on reliability requirements.
